item.title: PFC, REC say merger transition smooth; merged firm to have 20% exposure cap
item.description: Power financiers say post-merger single-entity exposure limit will be 20%, expect adequate headroom for borrowings and smooth transition

item.title: New CPI series pegs India's retail inflation at 2.75% in January
item.description: Officials stressed that the December number under the old series and the January print are not comparable

item.title: New consumer inflation data to bolster policy responses: CEA Nageswaran
item.description: At 2.75%, January price rise well below RBI's target of 4%

item.title: PM Modi to chair last Cabinet meeting in South Block before PMO shift
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will chair a special meeting of the Union Cabinet at South Block on Friday, the last such gathering at the British-era se...

item.title: India pulls out of Russian-backed Mali lithium project over security risks
item.description: Both sources, who were directly involved in the decision-making, sought anonymity because the discussions were confidential
